mapper.select: SELECT id, active_provider_id, active_project_context_id, active_project_space_id, active_project_iteration_id, updated_at FROM project_provider_setting WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE project_provider_setting SET active_provider_id = #{activeProviderId}, active_project_context_id = #{activeProjectContextId}, active_project_space_id = #{activeProjectSpaceId}, active_project_iteration_id = #{activeProjectIterationId}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, provider_id, external_project_id, project_name, external_cloude_req_project_id, cloude_req_project_name, active, extra_json, created_at, updated_at FROM project_context WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE project_context SET active = 0, updated_at = (datetime('now')) WHERE provider_id = #{providerId}

UPDATE project_context SET project_name = #{projectName}, external_cloude_req_project_id = #{externalCloudeReqProjectId}, cloude_req_project_name = #{cloudeReqProjectName}, active = #{active}, extra_json = #{extraJson}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, provider_id, project_context_id, external_space_id, space_name, extra_json, created_at, updated_at FROM project_space WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, provider_id, project_context_id, project_space_id, external_iteration_id, iteration_name, status, start_at, end_at, extra_json, created_at, updated_at FROM project_iteration WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE project_iteration SET iteration_name = #{iterationName}, status = #{status}, start_at = #{startAt}, end_at = #{endAt}, extra_json = #{extraJson}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE project_data_sync_history SET status = #{status}, context_count = COALESCE(#{contextCount}, context_count), work_item_count = COALESCE(#{workItemCount}, work_item_count), active_project_context_id = #{activeProjectContextId}, active_project_space_id = #{activeProjectSpaceId}, active_project_iteration_id = #{activeProjectIterationId}, result_json = #{resultJson}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, completed_at = #{completedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
